summary: Tested new CalendarView component for SCHEDULING board. All 16 UI features and 7 backend API tests passed. Calendar displays orders by cancel_date, supports month/week views, drag & drop date changes, move-to-board functionality, configurable visible fields with localStorage persistence, and dark/light theme support.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/orders?board=SCHEDULING returns orders with cancel_date - PASS
Backend: Orders have all 8 default calendar fields (client, quantity, blank_status, screens, production_status, trim_status, artwork_status, cancel_date) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/orders/{id} updates cancel_date (drag & drop support) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/orders/bulk-move moves orders between boards - PASS
Backend: bulk-move requires authentication - PASS
Backend: Order data structure includes all required fields for CalendarView component - PASS
Backend: cancel_date format is YYYY-MM-DD compatible with date-fns parseISO - PASS
Frontend: Calendar toggle button appears on SCHEDULING board - PASS
Frontend: CalendarView component renders when toggle clicked - PASS
Frontend: Month view shows correct month grid (MARZO 2026) - PASS
Frontend: Navigation buttons (prev/next/Hoy) work correctly - PASS
Frontend: '3 sin fecha' badge shows orders without cancel_date - PASS
Frontend: Week/Month view toggle works (Semana shows '16 mar - 22 mar 2026' format) - PASS
Frontend: Settings gear opens column configuration panel - PASS
Frontend: 'Restaurar predeterminados' button present in config panel - PASS
Frontend: All 8 default field toggles present in config panel - PASS
Frontend: Order cards show fields (Cliente, QTY, Blank Status, Screens, Production Status) - PASS
Frontend: Move-to-board button appears on card hover - PASS
Frontend: Move-to-board dropdown opens with board options - PASS
Frontend: Today's date (March 20) highlighted with blue circle - PASS
Frontend: Toggle back to table view preserves data - PASS
Frontend: Theme toggle works on calendar view (dark/light) - PASS
Frontend: Field toggle persists to localStorage (cal_visible_fields) - PASS
Frontend: Reset button restores all 8 default fields - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarView.js: Well-structured component with proper date handling using date-fns library
CalendarView.js lines 40-44: parseDate function correctly handles both YYYY-MM-DD and ISO datetime formats
CalendarView.js lines 175-180: visibleFields state properly initializes from localStorage with fallback to DEFAULT_VISIBLE
CalendarView.js lines 218-236: handleDrop correctly updates cancel_date via PUT API and refreshes orders
CalendarView.js lines 241-250: handleMoveToBoard correctly uses POST /api/orders/bulk-move API
Dashboard.js lines 556-561: Calendar toggle only shows when currentBoard === 'SCHEDULING'
Dashboard.js line 708: CalendarView rendered conditionally based on calendarMode && currentBoard === 'SCHEDULING'
StatusBadge component (lines 47-57) properly handles status colors from STATUS_COLORS constant
ColumnConfig component (lines 60-99) properly handles localStorage persistence and reset functionality
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing orders in SCHEDULING board.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 tests the new CalendarView component on SCHEDULING board. Key data: 7 orders in SCHEDULING, 4 with cancel_date (62970: 2026-03-14, 814: 2026-04-07, 815: 2026-04-07, 808: 2026-04-06), 3 without cancel_date shown in 'sin fecha' badge. CalendarView uses date-fns for date operations, localStorage key 'cal_visible_fields' for persistence, and supports both dark/light themes. APIs: PUT /api/orders/{id} for drag/drop date update, POST /api/orders/bulk-move for board move.
